title: sophora unifoliata var. elliptica
intro: Sophora unifoliata var. elliptica, also known as the Chinese Sophora, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a type of legume native to China, with medicinal properties that have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Sophora unifoliata var. elliptica is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being dried and processed into capsules or tablets for medicinal purposes.
